title: galium ciliatum
intro: Galium ciliatum, also known as False orpine, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Galium ciliatum include treating various health conditions such as wounds, bruises, and skin irritations, as well as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Galium ciliatum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
